The '''''Pathfinder''-class scout ship''' was a [[Scout ship/Legends|scout vessel]] first produced by [[Vangaard Industries]] over sixty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="GG8" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:Vpath.jpg|thumb|left|180px]]
The Pathfinder was notable for the unique design of its [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] generator. When the shields absorbed a hit, the energy absorbed was diverted to the ship's turret-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]], increasing its firepower. After three hits, however, the generator overloaded, and the ship's shields were unusable for a brief period of time. Some early models were actually destroyed due to explosions in their shield generators. Many [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] and [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] operating Pathfinders replaced their ships' shield generators with more conventional ones which were not prone to overload. Others elected to keep the original generators, either to save the 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] price of a rebuilt shield generator or to keep the damage-absorbing properties of its weapons systems.<ref name="GG8" />

Although the problems with the shields led to Vangaard stopping production of the Pathfinder, it found success as a privately owned scout ship even as late as the New Republic era. It was inexpensive, had sufficient space for a scout's cargo and passengers, could operate for six standard months without supplies, and (except for the shields) was extremely reliable.<ref name="GG8" />

==History==
At the time of its introduction, the Pathfinder-class scout ship was a cutting-edge scout vessel, one of the first ships of its size to include a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and computer-assisted weapons systems.<ref name="GG8" />

Even at [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] it was very popular among private owners and independent [[Scout/Legends|scouts]].<ref name="GG8" /> Two Pathfinders were in service with the [[Black Hole Gang/Legends|Black Hole Pirates]] shortly before the group's escape from the [[Black Hole sector]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="SM2">''[[The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 2: Curse of the Black Hole Pirates]]''</ref>

The ''[[Atrivis Advancer]]'' was a Pathfinder owned by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and operated by [[Flinor Tekkirl]].<ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref> The [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] scout [[Yurdak Fav]] owned a modified Pathfinder named the ''[[Zol-Uvena]]''.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> The Alliance scout [[Jobany Cyrs]] flew the ''[[Outward Bound]]'', a Pathfinder that had been in his family for several generations.<ref name="BSS">''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]''</ref>
